"Written in a strange dredge script. Looks vaguely like Old Dwarven."
—Engineer Radley

"Yes yes, it was a tragedy. But also an opportunity! Those dam pieces are historical artifacts!"
—Cin

This item only has value as part of a collection.

"Yes, mines have pins, too. It helps keep them from blowing up when carrying them."
—Tiga

"You act with the honor of Wardens. Thank you for your help."
—Quennida

"You are true friend of the Nrocroc."
—Nrocroc Chief

"You can guard against everything but yourself."
—Guard Splintering Serenity

"You can hear this from the highest peaks"
—Pact Crusader D'Stolt

"You can hit them even harder with my special gloves."
—Latera Painstorm

"You can read between the lines. More harnesses than Dolyaks."
—Warmaster Jofast

"You can read between the lines. More harnesses than dolyaks."
—Warmaster Jofast

"You can still feel magic pulsing through it's veins."
—Leigheara

"You can't beat your enemy if you have your skull caved in, can you?"
—Legionnaire Neverburn

"You can't have light without a little fire, now, can you?"
—Maakel The Immortal

"You can't ignore this land's plea to protect it from the legendary evil."
—Toka Axegrinder

"You can't use standard-issue gear, especially in our field of research."
—Researcher Zippti

"You cannot fall if you are always standing."
—Guardian Infinite Mind

"You could sneak up on the Master of Whispers in these things."
—Slayer Feldera

"You don't want to get any of this stuff on your hands. Crystal or ghost. Trust me."
—Erria

"You don't want your hands to damage the artifacts."
—Priory Researcher Raekk

"You guessed it: more secret pockets. One by the ankle, and another we designed into the heel."
—Kai

"You kill enough centaurs, you'll need some gloves. Trust me."
—Barnaby

"You know what they say about idle hands..."
—Zalvax Brokenclaw

"You lead like quaggan now. OOOoooOOooo"
—Commander Spleedoop

"You look tougher than a dolyak in these."
—Warmaster Jofast

"You make the most noise with motion."
—Sizza

"You must outthink them."
—Sigrytha

"You need a good loud horn when working with dolyaks. Keeps them in line."
—Lyot

"You need these more than I do. I don't wear shoes."
—Hua'racche

"You need to follow your enemy, even if it means into the darkness."
—Warden Spy Alarin

"You need to learn all you can about your enemy if you're going to defeat them."
—Scholar Maroola

"You paid for this in centaur blood."
—Diedra

"You see it; you can shoot it."
—Nessi

"You sure earned your pay on this one."
—Lieutenant Ryder

"You will need a good blade."
—Recruit Tochacatl

"You'd be surprised at the amount of information this staff can collect."
—Seesa

"You'd be surprised how many uses a fisher like me has for a shield."
—Fisher Leudap

"You'd never guess the last one wearing this got hit by a trebuchet, would you?"
—Sergeant Yarbrough

"You'd think it would be easier to clean the tar off these."
-Legionnaire Kress Rustmaw

"You'll like the extra padding around the ears when the cannons fire."
—Legionnaire Bladechipper

"You're going to need one of these when fighting mighty foes like the jotun."
—Neida
<c=@flavor>"You're one of us now. Just don't let it go to your head." —Cap</c>

"You've got some bite after all—just not enough to best the best."
—Vollym

"Your lucky day! I usually keep things this shiny."
—Mrr'kkant

"Your standard dagger. Why don't you let me sharpen that up for ya?"
—Waldo

"Your strength and bravery are inspirations to us all."
—Warden Llew

"Zhaitan may be big, but every little cut adds up."
—Warmaster Chan
<c=@flavor>After all the adventurers, I feel like this is my favorite place to visit. It is relaxing and cheery, even if it does have bandits, wolves, centaurs, and mean skritt.</c>
<c=@flavor>Attire worn by Countess Anise, Master Exemplar of the Shining Blade.</c>
<c=@flavor>Created to honor Gwen Thackeray, commander of the Ebon Vanguard and founder of Ebonhawke.</c>
<c=@flavor>Dieser Rücken-Gegenstand wird zur Herstellung legendärer "Janthir Wilds"-Objekte gebraucht. Überreste können bei Händlern für Ansehen-Herzen an der Tiefland-Küste erworben werden.</c>
<c=@flavor>Do you remember Hunger Royale? Imagine it was Southsun Survival, but with teams.</c>
<c=@flavor>Doppelklicken, um eine accountgebundene Belohnung auszuwählen.</c>
<c=@flavor>Ever hear the legend about adventurers paying for someone to make the dangerous trek to Droknar's Forge? Making the trip south in this weather? No thanks!</c>
<c=@flavor>Ever heard of the famous collectors Professor Yakkington and Nicholas the Traveler? I feel there's a lot of us hoarders out there. Never know when you might need something!</c>
<c=@flavor>Getting lost during the sandstorm was harrowing. Still, I'm glad these Zephyrite crystals gave us a taste of what having a raptor or springer is like.</c>
<c=@flavor>Hey, you said you were some kind of gladium? And that's a bad thing? Well, I think you're good just cause you're you. I can tell there's something special about you, skritt-friend.</c>
<c=@flavor>I don't understand some of those quaggan. We were trying to rescue them, but they got all angry and attacked the krait. Guess they really wanted revenge.</c>
<c=@flavor>I liked learning about the hylek. They seem like such a nice bunch. But we have to see the dragon champion, skritt-friend.</c>
<c=@flavor>I once told you about the quality armor the Granite Citadel used to have centuries ago. Wonder what that looked like.</c>
<c=@flavor>I wonder if we'll find any more scratches of this size out there. So fascinating.</c>
<c=@flavor>I wonder what it would have been like to know Lyssa back then. She would be so shiny to look at. Anyway, we made it this far.</c>
<c=@flavor>I would think more skritt would live here given all the shiny chests.</c>
<c=@flavor>In seinem Kern ist die unverminderte Hitze des Sterns bewahrt.</c><c=@abilitytype>Gewölbe-Kategorie: Lokale Bedrohung</c>
<c=@flavor>It is quite something to think there were adventurers that never experienced the Searing.</c>
<c=@flavor>It seems the scratch here learned a bit from the norn by Kyesjard.</c>
<c=@flavor>It's a fascinating realization that there's only a small bit of greenery outside their homeland. Even with my fur, I still don't enjoy the cold much.</c>
<c=@flavor>It's remarkable that after all these years, there are those that think the treaty was a bad idea. Just look at what all the races of Tyria accomplished together.</c>
It's shaped like a hug.
<c=@Flavor>Now imbued, the depth of the gem draws your eye with imperial authority.
<c=@flavor>Remember defending and clearing the way to the Citadel of Flame?</c>
<c=@flavor>Remember the times we had together. I will be visiting sky friends and will tell them all about you.</c>
<c=@flavor>Rox's bow is her memorial to Skewer, her late pet.</c>
<c=@flavor>The Consortium has a weird definition of vacation. There were explosive mines, drakes, and lots of karka out there. But the beach was nice.</c>
<c=@Flavor>The gem now gives off a fiery luminescence and fills your palm with warm light.</c>
<c=@Flavor>The inclusions in this gem look like swirling water.</c>
<c=@flavor>The Invasion of Orr was a sight to behold.</c>
<c=@flavor>The Krytans cannot catch a break. First the Tower of Nightmares, then Fort Salma, Lake Doric, and Garenhoff losing their tower. Guess you can't let the hard times get you down.</c>

The only words visible are: "Talk time dark snow."
—Mensorr
<c=@Flavor>The sapphire seems to change color as it moves, shifting through vivid earthy patterns. </c>
<c=@flavor>There were so many evacuees after the attack. It's hard to imagine losing your home. Thankfully, the Vigil offered a place of safety while we tried to help those still trapped.</c>
<c=@Flavor>This gem makes the air around it shimmer with color.</c>
<c=@flavor>This wolf mace once belonged to Borje the Sunchaser.</c>
<c=@flavor>This wolf shield once belonged to Borje the Sunchaser.</c>
<c=@flavor>To awaken from a dream into the real world must be a shock. How do you know friend from foe? But no time for dark thoughts. Let's check out the market.</c>
<c=@flavor>To think that we'd have to go up that high! I think fate is waiting on us, skritt-friend. Adventure is out there!</c>
<c=@flavor>To think there's so much danger just south of Lion's Arch. pirates, jungle wurms, Frost Legion...</c>
WARNING: Flammable
<c=@flavor>We did a lot of practicing on our roller beetles. For a relatively short course, the timings for those turns are tight. We got so close to gold.</c>
<c=@flavor>While you were deep in thought about that big cauldron, I went off to chase the big shiny. You can't change the past. Don't lose sight of the present moment.</c>
<c=@flavor>You helped friendly skritt from danger! I've learned that you will be around no matter how things go, skritt-friend.</c>
